org.vorpal.blade.services.loadbalancer
Class LoadBalancerSettingsManager

java.lang.Object
  org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.SettingsManager<ProxyConfig>
      org.vorpal.blade.services.loadbalancer.LoadBalancerSettingsManager

public class LoadBalancerSettingsManager
extends org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.SettingsManager<ProxyConfig>

This class extends the SettingsManager class so that the initialize method can be invoked to perform custom configurations.
